meta.name: coach_architect_handoff_v2_extension
meta.description_fr: Extension optionnelle qui complète le handoff v1 (même racine JSON). Alignée sur output_schema.design_update de architect-agent-complete.json v2. Le palier d’intervention autoritaire reste intervention_level du v1.
meta.description_en: Optional extension completing the v1 handoff (same JSON root). Aligned with output_schema.design_update in architect-agent-complete v2. Authoritative intervention tier remains v1 intervention_level.

optional_fields.render_type: studio_photo | ad_poster | cinematic_poster | product_packaging | business_card | official_document | social_banner | flyer | brochure | string libre
optional_fields.applied_operations: liste d’identifiants d’opérations (photo, layout, grade, etc.)
